title: Panel deputies working in the Midlands
body: "Where do these panel deputies work?  The panel deputies on this list work across the counties of Derbyshire, Herefordshire, Leicestershire, Lincolnshire, Northamptonshire, Nottinghamshire, Rutland, Shropshire, Staffordshire, Warwickshire, West Midlands and Worcestershire.
